backend/main.mo: Motoko backend actor that stores race entries, tracks leaderboards per track, and provides query functions to retrieve race details, track leaderboards, and available tracks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features including 3D racing game, 10+ characters, Mario Kart-style mechanics, race state management, and vibrant UI design with associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, hooks, pages, and configuration files for the kart racing game application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes using OKLCH color system with racing game color palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Kart Racer application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component managing game state and navigation between character selection, race, results, and leaderboard screens with QueryClient provider.
frontend/src/components/CharacterCard.ts: Character selection card component displaying character avatar, name, description, and stats with hover effects and selection state styling.
frontend/src/components/GameLogo.tsx: Animated game logo component displaying the Kart Racer logo image with bounce animation.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout wrapper component providing gradient background styling for all game screens.
frontend/src/components/PlayerKart.tsx: 3D player kart component with physics-based movement, keyboard controls, drift mechanics, collision detection with track boundaries, and lap progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/PowerUpItem.tsx: 3D power-up item component that rotates, bobs, handles collection state, and respawns after 5 seconds.
frontend/src/components/RaceCamera.tsx: Third-person camera component that smoothly follows the kart from behind using lerp interpolation and looks at the kart position.
frontend/src/components/RaceCountdown.ts: Displays a 3-2-1 countdown overlay with animations before the race starts, automatically hiding when countdown reaches zero.
frontend/src/components/RaceHUD.tsx: Renders the racing heads-up display showing lap counter, elapsed time, current speed, and active power-up in styled overlay panels.
frontend/src/components/RaceTrack.tsx: Creates a 3D oval race track using Three.js with ground plane, track surface with markings, start/finish line with checker pattern, inner/outer barriers, and decorative elements.
frontend/src/data/characters.ts: Defines the Character interface and exports an array of 10 playable racing characters, each with unique stats (speed, acceleration, handling) and kart colors.
frontend/src/data/powerups.ts: Defines the PowerUp interface and exports three power-up types (speed boost, shield, rocket) with their effects, durations, and colors.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the Internet Computer backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on identity state and invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCollisionDetection: Provides collision detection logic that checks if a kart position exceeds the track radius and returns corrected positions to keep karts within bounds.
frontend/src/hooks/useDrifting.ts: Manages drift mechanics by tracking drift state and duration, awarding a temporary speed boost when a successful drift is completed.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useKartControls.ts: Handles keyboard input for kart controls (WASD/arrow keys for movement, space for drift) and returns normalized control values when racing is enabled.
frontend/src/hooks/useLapTracking.ts: Tracks lap progress by monitoring checkpoint passage based on kart position angle, incrementing lap count when all four checkpoints are completed in sequence.
frontend/src/hooks/useLeaderboard.ts: Fetches and returns leaderboard data for a specific track using the useGetTrackLeaderboard query hook.
frontend/src/hooks/usePhysics.ts: Implements kart physics simulation including acceleration, braking, steering, friction, drift boost, and speed limiting based on character stats and control inputs.
frontend/src/hooks/usePowerUps.ts: Manages power-up collection and activation state, allowing players to collect one power-up and use it with a 3-second active duration.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching race details, track leaderboards, and available tracks from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useRaceState.ts: Manages overall race state including status (waiting/countdown/racing/finished), lap counting, elapsed time tracking, and race lifecycle methods.
frontend/src/hooks/useRaceTimer.ts: Custom React hook that tracks elapsed time during a race with start/stop control and formats time as MM:SS.MS.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveRace.ts: Custom React hook that saves race results to the backend canister using the actor, managing loading and error states.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, racing game colors, and bounce animation keyframes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/CharacterSelection.ts: Character selection screen displaying a grid of character cards with selection state and a start button to proceed to racing.
frontend/src/pages/Leaderboard.tsx: Leaderboard page displaying top race times for Rainbow Circuit track with rank icons, formatted times, and navigation back to character selection.
frontend/src/pages/RaceGame.tsx: Main racing game page with 3D Canvas rendering the track, player kart, power-ups, HUD, countdown, and race completion logic.
frontend/src/pages/RaceResults.tsx: Race completion screen showing final time, character info, username input for leaderboard submission, and navigation to leaderboard or restart.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending default theme with custom colors (racing theme), border radius variables, animations, and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project configuration for a Mario Kart-inspired 3D racing game with 10+ playable characters, featuring implemented core racing mechanics, character selection, power-ups, and race state management. One pending feature request remains for backend leaderboard storage of race completion records.
